title: NotSoVanilla
description: NotSoVanilla (NSV): A Breath of Fresh Air for Minecraft. Keep it Vanilla with some chocolate topping
body:
**Tired of the same old vanilla Minecraft experience?**
---

**NotSoVanilla (NSV)** is here to spice things up without completely overhauling the game you love. This modpack offers a carefully curated selection of mods that enhance gameplay, improve visuals, and optimize performance, all while preserving the core Minecraft experience. Whether you’re a survivalist, explorer, or builder, this modpack makes your adventure better without overwhelming you with drastic changes.

**Key Features:**
---

**Performance Optimization:**
- Enjoy faster load times, smoother gameplay, and improved chunk loading with performance-focused mods.
  - *Client Side Noteblocks, Sodium, Lithium, Enhanced Block Entities, Dynamic FPS, FastQuit,* and more.
---

**Visual Enhancements:**
- Beautify your world with improved visual elements like falling leaves, enhanced particles, and unique mob models.
  - *Amendments, Explosive Enhancement, ItemPhysic, Model Gap Fix, Villager Names, Visuality, Terralith,* and others.
---

**Quality-of-Life Improvements:**
- Streamline your gameplay with a variety of mods that make crafting, exploration, and inventory management easier and more enjoyable.
  - *AppleSkin, CarryOn, Jade, Easy Elytra Takeoff, Snuffles, Inventory Profiles Next, RightClickHarvest, Tiny Item Animations,* and more.
---

**Survival-Focused Gameplay:**
- Designed with the survival player in mind, these mods refine the Minecraft experience with useful mechanics for crafting, farming, and exploration.
  - *Crops Love Rain, Veinminer, FallingTree, Echo Chest, Traveler's Backpack, Friends & Foes, Persistent Parrots,* and more.
---

**Fixes & Gameplay Adjustments:**
- Address minor annoyances and gameplay quirks with tweaks that smooth out rough edges and improve your overall experience.
  - *Better boat movement, Debugify, HerdsPanic, Fixed Villager Trades, Easy Anvils, Jump Over Fences,* and more.
---

**Single-Player Experience:**
- These improvements are client-side, allowing you to upgrade your single-player adventure without affecting multiplayer servers.
---

**NotSoVanilla** ensures that your Minecraft experience remains familiar, but with enhanced performance, visuals, and quality-of-life improvements. Dive in and explore a world that feels fresh but stays true to its roots!
```
